title: ajuga novoguineensis
intro: Ajuga novoguineensis, also known as New Guinea bugleweed, is a plant species native to New Guinea and other parts of Asia, belonging to the Lamiaceae family. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Ajuga novoguineensis include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and provide protection against certain types of cancer. The herbal preparations of Ajuga novoguineensis include teas, infusions, and extracts, which can be used to treat various health conditions.
